theme_rankings.tagline: 🤖 크립토 버전 AI 베팅 — 분산 컴퓨팅·에이전트
theme_rankings.why_now: AI Capex 사이클의 크립토 노출. 미국 AI 주식 테마와 동행 흐름.
theme_rankings.risk: 내러티브 의존도 큼. 실수요 검증 아직 미흡. 알트 변동성 폭.

theme_rankings.why_now: 실제 매출 + 토큰 보유자 환원. P/S 가시화로 밸류에이션 재평가 단계.
theme_rankings.risk: 스마트컨트랙트 위험 + 규제. 매출은 시장 변동성에 큰 폭으로 변동.

theme_rankings.why_now: 기관 자금 유입 가장 빠른 영역. BlackRock·Franklin 등 진입.
theme_rankings.risk: 규제 의존적. 거시 금리 환경 변화 시 단기 자금 이탈 가능.

theme_rankings.why_now: 거버넌스보단 실제 트래픽·결제 사용처. TON·BNB 일일 활성 유저 검증.
theme_rankings.risk: 투기 대비 변동성 낮지만 폭발력도 작음. 환희장에서 underperform.

theme_rankings.tagline: 🥇 시장 방향성 기준 — 비트는 디지털 금, 이더는 인프라
theme_rankings.why_now: BTC ETF 자금 유입, ETH 스테이킹 + L2 매출. 알트 사이클의 출발점.
theme_rankings.risk: 거시 유동성·금리에 직접 노출. ETF 자금 흐름이 단기 방향성을 좌우.

theme_rankings.tagline: 📈 ETF 승인 후보 + 이더 L2 — 기관 매집 영역
theme_rankings.why_now: SOL·LTC ETF 가능성 + L2 거래량 회복. 다음 cycle 메이저 후보.
theme_rankings.risk: ETF 미승인 시 단기 조정. L2는 fee market 경쟁 심화.

theme_rankings.tagline: 🌐 검증된 L1 — 이더 외 실수요 입증된 체인들
theme_rankings.why_now: 솔라나 압도적 점유 + 신흥 L1(Sui·Aptos)도 자금 유입. 생태계 prop value 확보.
theme_rankings.risk: L1 간 경쟁 격화. 사용자·개발자 이탈 시 멀티플 빠르게 축소.

theme_rankings.why_now: 토큰 가격은 하락했지만 매출 폭증 중. AI Capex 사이클의 크립토 노출 직접.
theme_rankings.risk: 토큰 인플레이션 압력 + 사용자 보상 의존. 베어 마켓에서 매도 압력 큼.

narrative.summary: Hyperliquid: 정량 종합 57점, 라벨 HOLD. 단기 63 / 중기 68 / 장기 42. (LLM 미연결 — 정량 요약만 표기)

top_news.title: Oil Steadies After First Drop This Week on Peace Talk Optimism
top_news.summary: Oil was steady after its first decline this week on optimism that talks between the US and Iran will see energy flows resume through the Strait of Hormuz.

top_news.title: Private Credit Deterioration Slow, Contained: Robson
top_news.summary: Meghan Robson, head of US credit strategy at BNP Paribas, and Sonali Pier, portfolio manager: multi-sector credit at PIMCO, join Katie Greifeld on "Bloomberg Real Yield." Cliffwater, Blackstone, and Partners Group all capped certain fund redemptions this week. The moves put private markets back into the spotlight. (Source: Bloomberg)

top_news.title: Saylor’s Bitcoin Machine Is Misfiring on Every Cylinder
top_news.summary: Michael Saylor built Strategy Inc. around a straightforward idea: raise money to buy Bitcoin, then never sell it. Over time, that simple bet has turned far more complicated.

top_news.title: Blackstone-Backed Liftoff Rises 9.1% After $437 Million US IPO
top_news.summary: Liftoff Mobile Inc. shares climbed 24% in their debut after raising $437 million in a US initial public offering, in the company’s second attempt at going public this year.

top_news.title: Princeton Endowment Backs Out of Oil and Gas Divestment Vow
top_news.summary: Bloomberg's Janet Lorin joins Katie Greifeld on "Bloomberg Real Yield." Princeton University’s endowment is backtracking on its pledge to divest from publicly traded oil and gas companies, four years after it said it would exit such holdings as way to move toward a net-zero portfolio. (Source: Bloomberg)

top_news.title: US Strategic Petroleum Reserve Nears a 3-Year Low
top_news.summary: The US buffer for crude oil is shrinking fast as the Iran war drags on. The country’s emergency petroleum stockpile, known as the Strategic Petroleum Reserve, has shrunk to levels last seen in mid-2023, after the Biden administration decided to withdraw SPR crude barrels to mitigate the oil-price impact of the Russia-Ukraine war. The global oil supply chain is becoming more vulnerable with each passing day the Strait of Hormuz remains closed.  Ellen Wald, President of Transversal Consulting join

top_news.title: Treasuries Rise as Oil Signals Optimism on Iran Peace Accord
top_news.summary: Treasuries rose and the dollar slipped as investors drew optimism about the prospects for a US-Iran peace deal from a conditional ceasefire between Israel and Lebanon, despite ongoing clashes.

top_news.title: CrowdStrike narrowly beats estimates on AI tailwinds, but stock falls 10%
top_news.summary: CrowdStrike shares have rallied nearly 60% this year on skyrocketing demand for cybersecurity in the age of advanced artificial intelligence.

top_news.title: HPE surges 19% after Monday's blowout earnings, closing its best day ever
top_news.summary: CEO Antonio Neri told CNBC that the company is "uniquely positioned" to capture the disruption brought about by artificial intelligence.

top_news.title: Lenovo shares jump nearly 20% on record earnings as AI revenue nearly doubles
top_news.summary: Shares of Lenovo surged over 15% on Friday, after the electronics giant posted strong revenue growth bolstered by its artificial intelligence business.

memecoin_alpha.name: Ansem
